phrases.intent_en: Ask where the temporary exhibition hall is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la exposición temporal?
phrases.pronunciation: Dis-KOOL-peh, poh-DREE-ah in-dee-KAR-meh DON-deh es-TAH lah ex-poh-see-SYOHN tem-poh-RAHL?

likely_response.local: Segunda planta, sala número cuatro al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOON-dah PLAHN-tah SAH-lah NÚ-meh-roh koo-AHT-roh AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: Second floor, room number four at the end.

responses.english: Second floor, room number four at the end.
responses.phonetic: seh-GOON-dah PLAHN-tah SAH-lah NÚ-meh-roh koo-AHT-roh AHL FOHN-doh
responses.french: Segunda planta, sala número cuatro al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the Palace of Charles V entrance
phrases.text_local: ¿Cómo llego a la entrada del Palacio de Carlos V?
phrases.pronunciation: KÓ-moh YEH-goh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah DEHL pah-lah-THEE-oh DEH KAHR-lohs B

likely_response.local: Salga al patio, gire a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SAHL-gah AHL pah-TEE-oh HEE-reh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Exit to the courtyard, turn right.

responses.english: Exit to the courtyard, turn right.
responses.phonetic: SAHL-gah AHL pah-TEE-oh HEE-reh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Salga al patio, gire a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the audio guide desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de audioguías?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el mohs-trah-DOHR deh ow-dee-oh-GHEE-ahs

likely_response.local: Junto a la entrada principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: It is at the back, on the right.

responses.english: It is at the back, on the right.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Junto a la entrada principal, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if Alhambra ticket includes this museum
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿la entrada de la Alhambra incluye esto?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs LAH ehnt-RAH-dah DEH LAH ahl-AHMB-rah eenth-LOO-yeh EH-stoh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the main ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the main ticket office.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Spanish painting galleries are
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde puedo encontrar las salas de pintura española?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh PWEH-doh en-kon-TRAHR lahs SAH-lahs deh peen-TOO-rah es-pah-NYOH-lah?

likely_response.local: Segunda planta, sector oeste del museo.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOON-dah PLAHN-tah sehth-TOHR oh-EH-steh DEHL moo-SEH-oh
likely_response.translation_en: Second floor, west sector of the museum.

responses.english: Second floor, west sector of the museum.
responses.phonetic: seh-GOON-dah PLAHN-tah sehth-TOHR oh-EH-steh DEHL moo-SEH-oh
responses.french: Segunda planta, sector oeste del museo.
